title: BEM-865 inline queue processor
objective:

p = Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
text = p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
insert = '''\n# BEM-865 inline workflow dispatch queue marker\n# Queue processing is handled after task execution by scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.py.\n'''
if 'BEM-865 inline workflow dispatch queue marker' not in text:
    text += insert
p.write_text(text, encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM865_INLINE_QUEUE_PROCESSOR_REQUESTED.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-865 inline queue processor\nStatus: REQUESTED\nReason: external push trigger and late codex step did not process queue.\nNext: runner must process queue inside primary execute path.\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(p))
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('marked need for inline queue processing in codex runner')
